cover_letter: NEED_INPUT: Please paste your resume (or key bullets: recent roles, stack, 2-3 wins) and the full Uniplaces job description (responsibilities + requirements). I’ll then tailor a 150–220 word cover letter and a 4–6 sentence email with your links.
email_subject: Application: Full Stack Developer at Uniplaces
email_body:
Hi Uniplaces team, 

I’d love to apply for the Full Stack Developer role. Can you share (or paste here) my resume details and the full job description text so I can tailor the cover letter and outreach email properly (specific stack, impact, and keywords)? Once I have that, I’ll return a tight cover letter plus an email that mentions my attached resume and includes my portfolio/GitHub/LinkedIn links.

Thanks!
